decision_tree.prompt: Runner on treadmill collapses. Treadmill belt still moving.

options.label: Hit the emergency stop, then check responsiveness
Pull the runner off the moving belt

decision_tree.prompt: No pulse. Gym staff approach. AED is on the wall 30 feet away.

options.label: Send a staff member to fetch the AED, start compressions

decision_tree.prompt: Compressions feel productive. Patient gasps once. Pulse still absent.

options.label: Continue compressions; agonal gasps are not a real pulse
Stop and check pulse for 30 seconds
